---
title: "metrics.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\metrics.py"
loc: 108
complexity: 6
logic_score: 5.65
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 4.36
overall_score: 3.17
---

## Intent
The `metrics.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ExecutionTracker, __init__, __enter__, __exit__, latency_ms, mem_delta_mb, report, track, decorator, wrapper, ProjectMetricsEngine, __init__, compute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ExecutionTracker, __init__, __enter__, __exit__, latency_ms, mem_delta_mb, report, track, decorator, wrapper, ProjectMetricsEngine, __init__, compute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [collections.abc](file://collections.abc)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)
- [src.core.prompt_linter](file://src.core.prompt_linter)
- [psutil](file://psutil)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [logging](file://logging)

### Exports
- `ExecutionTracker`
- `__init__`
- `__enter__`
- `__exit__`
- `latency_ms`
- `mem_delta_mb`
- `report`
- `track`
- `decorator`
- `wrapper`
- `ProjectMetricsEngine`
- `__init__`
- `compute`
